title: Only if item is in group trigger criteria improvements

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
The new “only if item is in group” criteria in custom automations should include “is NOT in group” as well.

Also this criteria is not available for all triggers yet. Specifically “When Date arrives” trigger.

Use case is a common “Due Date” column that when an item in a group (with groups representing subprocesses of the business process) is not done within its allotted time.
